TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Markel_Brown, title = Markel_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Markel_Brown} }

S.FORM: Markel Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 1, Markel Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Markel Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 1, Markel Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: markel βrown ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, markel βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
